subcodes.first_line: O thou who art captivated by the countenance of Baha! Thy letter of the 15th of Sha'ban 1339 was received and thy flowing verses were read [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مفتون روی بها نامه ۱۵ شعبان ۳۹ رسید و اشعار آبدار قرائت گردید جوش دریای
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
